intents.text: Does it install in the user directory by default, or only because it already exists there?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: does it by defualt install it in my user directory

intents.text: Remove the existing user directory installation and test again.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: can we remove it there and test again?

intents.text: Always target the current repository root, or walk up directories to find a `.claude` directory, falling back to repo root.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: going up from the current directory until there is a `.claude` directory
